Hi Sophie! Tell me what you're looking to create — the garment type, any design ideas, colours. I'll ask a few follow-up questions and put together a rough estimate for you. 👕

SC
I need tees for Sabrina Carpenters concert. Black, with a front chest print of our logo.
10:03 AM
CS
Great choice — black tees with a chest logo look really clean! A couple of quick questions:

1. How many pieces are you expecting to order?
2. When do you need them in hand?
3. Is your print single-colour or multicolour?
10:03 AM
SC
Around 200 pieces, need by 14 June. 2-colour print.
10:05 AM
CS
Perfect — here's your rough estimate for 200 units:
